scores.justification: The agent never executed any commands (tool_calls: 0) and therefore never investigated the pipeline status or connected the missing-orders symptom to pipe-07; the setup failed before any analysis could occur.

The agent produced no final text and made no tool calls, so it never mentioned --resume or --rollback as a recovery path.
